response: TEXT IS A KEY ELEMENT IN ANY DESIGN PROJECT. PIECE OF WORK IS IMPORTANT FOR A SUCCESSFUL RESULT. THE CENTRAL CIRCLE HAS A RADIUS OF R CM. THE NEXT CIRCLE HAS A RADIUS THAT IS 10% LARGER THAN THE PREVIOUS ONE. THIS PATTERN CONTINUES FOR A TOTAL OF 8 CONCENTRIC CIRCLES. CALCULATE THE TOTAL AREA COVERED BY ALL 8 CIRCLES COMBINED. EXPRESS YOUR ANSWER IN TERMS OF R AND PI. THE AREA OF A CIRCLE IS PI R SQUARE. THE AREA OF THE FIRST CIRCLE IS PI R SQUARE. THE AREA OF THE SECOND CIRCLE IS PI (1.1 R) SQUARE. THE AREA OF THE THIRD CIRCLE IS PI (1.21 R) SQUARE. THE AREA OF THE FOURTH CIRCLE IS PI (1.331 R) SQUARE. THE AREA OF THE FIFTH CIRCLE IS PI (1.4641 R) SQUARE. THE AREA OF THE SIXTH CIRCLE IS PI (1.61051 R) SQUARE. THE AREA OF THE SEVENTH CIRCLE IS PI (1.771561 R) SQUARE. THE AREA OF THE EIGHTH CIRCLE IS PI (1.9487171 R) SQUARE. THE TOTAL AREA COVERED BY ALL 8 CIRCLES IS PI R SQUARE (1 + 1.1 + 1.21 + 1.331 + 1.4641 + 1.61051 + 1.771561 + 1.9487171). THE TEXT IS PLACED ALONG THE CIRCUMFERENCE OF THE FIFTH CIRCLE. THE CIRCUMFERENCE OF THE FIFTH CIRCLE IS 2 PI R. THE TEXT IS EVENLY SPACED SUCH THAT THERE IS A 0.5 CM GAP BETWEEN EACH CHARACTER. THE TOTAL NUMBER OF CHARACTERS (INCLUDING SPACES) MUST BE AN INTEGER. THE MAXIMUM NUMBER OF CHARACTERS THAT CAN BE PLACED ALONG THIS CIRCUMFERENCE IS 2 PI R / 0.5. THE MAXIMUM NUMBER OF CHARACTERS IS 4 PI R. THE LETTER I APPEARS AT LEAST 11 TIMES. THE LETTER I IS A KEY ELEMENT IN THE DESIGN PROCESS. THE LETTER I IS IMPORTANT FOR
